metadata.name: Report a Downed Tree Blocking a Road

description: A citizen reports that a large tree has fallen and is completely blocking a public road.

nodes.task_description: Gather the location of the downed tree.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the exact location of the road blockage.

nodes.task_description: Recognize the issue as a public safety hazard and escalate it.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent flags the request as an emergency.

nodes.task_description: Create an emergency work order and dispatch a public works crew to clear the road.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent immediately dispatches a crew to the location.
